message:
test(speculation): add metamorphic tests for string distance and window invariants

Adds 19 metamorphic tests verifying core speculation module properties:

Levenshtein distance MRs:
- Symmetry: d(a,b) == d(b,a)
- Identity: d(a,a) == 0
- Triangle inequality: d(a,c) <= d(a,b) + d(b,c)
- Upper bound: d(a,b) <= max(len(a), len(b))
- Empty string identity: d("",b) == len(b)
- Single edit operations (+1 distance)

SpeculationWindow MRs:
- Interior point containment
- Exterior point exclusion
- Duration calculation consistency
- Saturating subtraction on invalid windows

These tests catch regressions in edit distance calculations used for
speculation drift metrics without requiring transcription oracles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
